goal: Equivalent governance outcomes across Claude Code, Copilot, and Codex

codex: PermissionRequest is Codex-native and must be mapped or waived
copilot: PreCompact and SubagentStart are currently wired
claude-code: Claude Code supports hooks through settings.json
cursor: Phase 1 (#3085) shipped hook enforcement (.cursor/hooks.json via scripts/global/cursor-hooks-emit.js camelCase event adapter) and HAMR substrate (HAMR_TEAM=cursor recognized by hamr-provider-wrapper, hamr_activation_check.py, hamr-activate.sh; ~/.cursor/hooks deployed) — REMAINING WAIVER: subagents/visual-qa/wiki/ticket-gate in Phase 2 (#3086)

Cursor hook events are camelCase (sessionStart/beforeSubmitPrompt/preToolUse/stop) plus natives subagentStart/subagentStop/beforeShellExecution/beforeMCPExecution/afterFileEdit; the adapter maps each onto the harness PascalCase taxonomy (SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/PreToolUse/PostToolUse/Stop)

strictAcceptance.hooks: Every supported runtime has equivalent gate outcomes
strictAcceptance.deploy: Operators can deploy one, any pair, or all three runtimes clearly
strictAcceptance.skills: Every canonical skill has an adapter or explicit waiver per runtime
strictAcceptance.tests: Parity checks inspect registrations, not only copied script bytes

wikiDocsParity.ingestionContract: Megingjord-only (npm run wiki:ingest); ingest-only artifacts (sources/, syntheses/, lint.js) deployed to Copilot wiki only; downstream runtimes read deployed artifacts

codex.notes: sources/ and syntheses/ are ingest-only; not deployed to Codex

claude-code.notes: Reads from ~/.copilot/wiki/ via wiki-knowledge.instructions.md; search command is node ~/.copilot/scripts/wiki-search.js

parityGaps: claude-code has no dedicated wiki home — reads Copilot runtime by design
codex wiki missing sources/ and syntheses/ (ingest-only artifacts; expected)
